description: One recursively indexed JSON array item. Its opaque host-allocated identity is independent of its numeric JSON Pointer locator and order.

id.description: Opaque stable identity allocated from the mutation-scoped transition ID namespace.

parent_id.description: Stable identity of the containing array.

order_key.description: A stable fractional order key; array position is derived from ordering and is not identity.

kind.description: The JSON value kind represented by this array item.

scalar_json.description: The complete raw JSON scalar encoded as text. Omitted when kind is object or array.

prefix_json.description: Exact JSON whitespace before this array item. Omitted when empty.

suffix_json.description: Exact whitespace after the value and before its comma or closing bracket. Omitted when empty.

empty_json.description: Exact whitespace inside this item's empty object or array value. Omitted for non-empty containers and scalars.
